scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n BE,FE -c blue,magenta "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.demo: python3 generate_demo_data.py && node scripts/seed_demo_db.js && concurrently -k -n BE,FE -c blue,magenta "SNAPSORT_DEMO=true npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
